hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'dry-run' && exit 0; staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); echo "$staged" | grep -qE "^(src/|supabase/)" && ! echo "$staged" | grep -qx "CLAUDE.md" && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: this commit stages code under src/ or supabase/ but does not include CLAUDE.md. If it adds or changes a feature, schema, RLS policy, edge function, cron, or cross-cutting convention, update CLAUDE.md (see the update-claude-md skill) before finalizing."},"systemMessage":"CLAUDE.md not staged with this code commit - check whether it needs updating."}'; exit 0
